package rulecoverage

func PositiveRouteSetupScatteredWithoutRouterPackage() string {
    ruleID := "route_setup_scattered_without_router_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Route registration split across unrelated files without a clear `router`, `routes`, or `transport` home."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
